steps.title: Locate the obstacle
steps.content: The passage says the cave ceiling was only a few feet high and the glyphs were as wide as ten feet. Because of those dimensions, there was no position from which the glyphs could be fully viewed or photographed.

steps.title: Select the stated challenge
steps.content: The challenge was the cave's dimensions preventing full viewing. A invents remoteness, B invents faint glyphs, and C contradicts the passage because the researchers did create a 3D model. The answer is D.
